strength.label: Horsepower Spectrum (HP)
strength.desc: Measures neuromuscular recruitment efficiency relative to body weight (DOTS coefficient). Higher values indicate stronger peak horsepower and chassis rigidity per unit body mass.

explosivePower.label: Torque Spectrum (TRQ)
explosivePower.desc: Measures instantaneous kinetic discharge and launch torque. Higher values indicate greater launch torque and vertical work capacity in very short time windows.

cardio.label: Stint Spectrum (STINT)
cardio.desc: Measures cardiovascular stability and aerobic ceiling. Higher values indicate stronger thermal management and long-stint endurance under sustained high-intensity operation.

muscleMass.label: Chassis Spectrum (CHSS)
muscleMass.desc: Measures skeletal-muscle density relative to height. Higher values indicate a more mature chassis build, structural load capacity, and baseline metabolic output.

bodyFat.label: Kerb Spectrum (P2W)
bodyFat.desc: Measures optimization between body-fat ratio and lean mass. Higher values indicate cleaner kerb-weight composition and a stronger power-to-weight profile.

gripStrength.label: Traction Spectrum (GRIP)
gripStrength.desc: Measures terminal neural response and grip output. Higher values indicate stronger tire traction and limit grip control.

G_PLATFORM.title: Serial Code: Iron Chassis (G-Platform)
G_PLATFORM.summary: Chassis rigidity is exceptionally high. In the {{genderGroup}} sequence, your torque output falls into heavy-platform class; gravity loads read as light cruising resistance.

HIGH_OUTPUT.title: Serial Code: High Output Afterburn (High-Output)
HIGH_OUTPUT.summary: Throttle response is extremely sensitive. Neural recruitment behaves like launch-control ignition, pushing power to redline in minimal distance.

ENDURANCE_PROTO.title: Serial Code: Endurance Prototype (Endurance-P)
ENDURANCE_PROTO.summary: Thermal management is outstanding. You demonstrate 24-hour Le Mans style stability, built to lead long-range endurance sectors.

WIDE_BODY.title: Serial Code: Wide-Body Architecture (Wide-Body)
WIDE_BODY.summary: Structural load profile shows dominant downforce characteristics. High-density fibers provide a powerful foundation, making you a stable heavyweight target across all terrain.

AERO_SPEC.title: Serial Code: Aero Optimization (Aero-Spec)
AERO_SPEC.summary: Power-to-weight has reached track-record class. With low drag and low fat ratio, every gram of mass is allocated for pure performance.

MR_SPEC.title: Serial Code: Mid-Engine Balance (MR-Spec)
MR_SPEC.summary: Steering feedback is surgically precise. Neural control resembles a mid-engine layout, enabling elegant corner entry and stable output through the apex.

GT_CRUISER.title: Serial Code: Grand Tourer (Grand Tourer)
GT_CRUISER.summary: All-spectrum performance is fully unlocked. You carry flagship-grade elegance and aggression, with no power dead zones across sector or weather. You are the most complete fit in this sequence.
